# Changelog

## [2.0.0] - 2024-06-15

### Breaking Changes
- Removed deprecated `oldMethod()`
- Minimum SDK bumped to 3.0

### Added
- New `newMethod()` API

## [1.2.0] - 2024-03-01

### Added
- Support for custom headers

### Fixed
- Memory leak in connection pool

## [1.1.0] - 2024-01-15

### Added
- Retry logic for failed requests

## [1.0.0] - 2023-10-01

### Initial release
